outcomes.title: Ratio and Root Test
outcomes.description: Use the ratio or root test to determine if a series is absolutely convergent or divergent.
outcomes.template:
Determine if \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= 0 }^\infty {{an}} converges absolutely, or diverges using the Ratio or Root Test.

Note that \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle a_n = {{an}}, a_{n+1} = {{anp1}}. So We have that: \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \lim_{n\to\infty} \left| {{anp1}} \cdot {{ar}} \right| = \lim_{n\to\infty} {{combine}} = {{limit}} <1. So \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= 0 }^\infty {{an}} converges absolutely by the Ratio Test.

Note that \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle |a_n| = \frac{ {{top}} }{ {{bottom}} }, b_n = \frac{1}{n^{ {{P}} } }. Note that a_n is a positive, eventually decreasing sequence. We have that: \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \lim_{n\to\infty} \frac{ {{top}} }{ {{bottom}} } \cdot \frac{ n^{ {{P}} } }{1} = \lim_{n\to\infty} \sqrt{\frac{ {{topsquare}} }{ {{bottomsquare}} } \cdot \frac{n^{ {{Psquare}} }}{1} } = \sqrt{\lim_{n\to\infty}\frac{ {{final}} }{ {{bottomsquare}} } } = {{simpcoeff}}. We can see that 0 < {{simpcoeff}} < \infty so by the Limit Comparison Test, \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= {{k0}} }^\infty \frac{ {{top}} }{ {{bottom}} } converges if and only if \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= {{k0}} }^\infty \frac{ 1 }{ n^{ {{P}} } } converges, which it does not by the p-test since {{P}} \leq 1. So \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= {{k0}} }^\infty \frac{ {{top}} }{ {{bottom}} } diverges and \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= {{k0}} }^\infty (-1)^n \frac{ {{top}} }{ {{bottom}} } does not converge absolutely.

But since \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \frac{ {{top}} }{ {{bottom}} } is a positive, eventually decreasing sequence, and \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \lim_{n\to\infty} \frac{ {{top}} }{ {{bottom}} } = 0, by the Alternating Series Test, \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= {{k0}} }^\infty (-1)^n \frac{ {{top}} }{ {{bottom}} } converges and is condionally convergent.

Determine if \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= {{k0}} }^\infty (-1)^n\left( {{Fn}} \right) converges absolutely, converges conditionally or diverges.

Note that \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle |a_n| = {{Fn}} , b_n = \frac{1}{n^{ {{P}} } }. Note that a_n is a positive, eventually decreasing sequence. We have that: \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \lim_{n\to\infty} \frac{ {{Fn}} }{ \frac{1}{ n^{ {{P}} } } } = \lim_{n\to\infty} \frac{ {{Fd}} }{ {{Pd}} } = {{limit}}. (Not all work shown.) We can see that \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} 0 < {{limit}} < \infty so by the Limit Comparison Test, \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= {{k0}} }^\infty \left( {{Fn}} \right) converges if and only if \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= {{k0}} }^\infty \frac{ 1 }{ n^{ {{P}} } } converges, which it does by the p-test since {{P}} > 1. So \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= {{k0}} }^\infty\left( {{Fn}} \right) converges and \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= {{k0}} }^\infty (-1)^n\left( {{Fn}} \right) converges absolutely.

Determine if \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= {{k0}} }^\infty (-1)^n \left( {{Fn}} \right) converges absolutely, condtionally or diverges.

Note that \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle |a_n| = {{Fn}} , b_n = \frac{1}{n^{ {{P}} } }. Note that a_n is a positive, eventually decreasing sequence. We have that: \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \lim_{n\to\infty} \frac{ {{Fn}} }{ \frac{1}{ n^{ {{P}} } } } = \lim_{n\to\infty} \frac{ {{Fd}} }{ {{Pd}} } = {{limit}}. (Not all work shown.) We can see that \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} 0 < {{limit}} < \infty so by the Limit Comparison Test, \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= {{k0}} }^\infty \left( {{Fn}} \right) converges if and only if \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= {{k0}} }^\infty \frac{ 1 }{ n^{ {{P}} } } converges, which it does not by the p-test since {{P}} \leq 1. So \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= {{k0}} }^\infty \left( {{Fn}} \right) diverges.

But since {{Fn}} is a positive, eventually decreasing sequence, and \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \lim_{n\to\infty} {{Fn}} = 0, by the Alternating Series Test, \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= {{k0}} }^\infty (-1)^n \left( {{Fn}} \right) converges and is condionally convergent.

Determine if \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= {{k0}} }^\infty (-1)^n\frac{ {{top}} }{ {{bottom}} } converges absolutely, converges conditionally or diverges.

Note that \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle |a_n| = \frac{ {{top}} }{ {{bottom}} } and that \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \lim_{n\to \infty} \frac{ {{top}} }{ {{bottom}} } = \sqrt{\lim_{n\to \infty} \frac{ {{topsquare}} }{ {{bottomsquare}} }} = {{simpcoeff}}\neq 0 and so \renewcommand{\log}{\ln} \displaystyle \sum_{ n= {{k0}} }^\infty (-1)^n\frac{ {{top}} }{ {{bottom}} } diverges.

tasks.combine: {\left| \frac{\sqrt{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2} + 1} {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} n!^{2} \log\left(5 \, n + 10\right)}{\sqrt{n^{2} + 1} n^{2 \, n} \left(n + 1\right)!^{2} \log\left(5 \, n + 5\right)} \right|}
{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \sqrt{2 \, n + 5} \left(2 \, n\right)! \log\left(n + 5\right)}{\sqrt{2 \, n + 3} n^{2 \, n} \left(2 \, n + 2\right)! \log\left(n + 4\right)} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \sqrt{3 \, n + 4} {\left(n + 1\right)}^{3} \left(2 \, n\right)!}{\sqrt{3 \, n + 1} {\left(n + 2\right)}^{3} n^{2 \, n} \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}

{\left| \frac{\sqrt{3 \, n^{2} + 5} {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} n!^{2} \log\left(3 \, n + 7\right)}{\sqrt{3 \, {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2} + 5} n^{2 \, n} \left(n + 1\right)!^{2} \log\left(3 \, n + 4\right)} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} {\left(n + 3\right)}^{3} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 6\right) n!^{2}}{{\left(n + 4\right)}^{3} n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 4\right) \left(n + 1\right)!^{2}} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \sqrt{2 \, n + 3} {\left(n + 1\right)}^{3} \left(2 \, n\right)!}{\sqrt{2 \, n + 1} {\left(n + 2\right)}^{3} n^{2 \, n} \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \sqrt{5 \, n + 8} n!^{2} \log\left(3 \, {\left(n + 1\right)}^{3} + 4\right)}{\sqrt{5 \, n + 3} n^{2 \, n} \left(n + 1\right)!^{2} \log\left(3 \, n^{3} + 4\right)} \right|}
{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 3\right) \left(2 \, n\right)!}{n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 1\right) \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}
{\left| \frac{\sqrt{3 \, {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2} + 4} {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \left(2 \, n\right)!}{\sqrt{3 \, n^{2} + 4} n^{2 \, n} \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}
{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \left(2 \, n\right)! \log\left(5 \, n + 9\right)}{n^{2 \, n} \left(2 \, n + 2\right)! \log\left(5 \, n + 4\right)} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} {\left(n + 3\right)}^{2} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 4\right) \left(2 \, n\right)!}{{\left(n + 4\right)}^{2} n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 6\right) \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}
{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \sqrt{5 \, n + 2} \left(2 \, n\right)!}{\sqrt{5 \, n + 7} n^{2 \, n} \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} {\left(n + 3\right)} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 7\right) \left(2 \, n\right)!}{{\left(n + 4\right)} n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 5\right) \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \sqrt{5 \, n + 8} \arctan\left(n + 2\right) \left(2 \, n\right)!}{\sqrt{5 \, n + 3} n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(n + 3\right) \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}

{\left| \frac{\sqrt{2 \, {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2} + 3} {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} {\left(n + 4\right)}^{3} \left(2 \, n\right)!}{\sqrt{2 \, n^{2} + 3} {\left(n + 3\right)}^{3} n^{2 \, n} \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} {\left(n + 3\right)}^{2} \left(2 \, n\right)! \log\left(2 \, n^{3} + 1\right)}{{\left(n + 4\right)}^{2} n^{2 \, n} \left(2 \, n + 2\right)! \log\left(2 \, {\left(n + 1\right)}^{3} + 1\right)} \right|}
{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{n + 1} \sqrt{2 \, n + 5} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 3\right) n!}{\sqrt{2 \, n + 3} n^{n} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 5\right) \left(n + 1\right)!} \right|}

{\left| \frac{\sqrt{2 \, n^{2} + 2} {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} n!^{2} \log\left(2 \, n^{3} + 3\right)}{\sqrt{2 \, {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2} + 2} n^{2 \, n} \left(n + 1\right)!^{2} \log\left(2 \, {\left(n + 1\right)}^{3} + 3\right)} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} {\left(n + 3\right)}^{3} \left(2 \, n\right)! \log\left(2 \, n + 5\right)}{{\left(n + 2\right)}^{3} n^{2 \, n} \left(2 \, n + 2\right)! \log\left(2 \, n + 3\right)} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} {\left(n + 4\right)}^{2} \left(2 \, n\right)! \log\left(2 \, n^{3} + 5\right)}{{\left(n + 3\right)}^{2} n^{2 \, n} \left(2 \, n + 2\right)! \log\left(2 \, {\left(n + 1\right)}^{3} + 5\right)} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} {\left(n + 4\right)}^{2} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 7\right) n!^{2}}{{\left(n + 3\right)}^{2} n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 5\right) \left(n + 1\right)!^{2}} \right|}

{\left| \frac{\sqrt{4 \, n^{2} + 5} {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \arctan\left(n + 2\right) \left(2 \, n\right)!}{\sqrt{4 \, {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2} + 5} n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(n + 1\right) \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}

{\left| \frac{\sqrt{3 \, n^{2} + 2} {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} {\left(n + 2\right)} \left(2 \, n\right)!}{\sqrt{3 \, {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2} + 2} {\left(n + 1\right)} n^{2 \, n} \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}

{\left| \frac{\sqrt{4 \, n^{2} + 3} {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 6\right) \left(2 \, n\right)!}{\sqrt{4 \, {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2} + 3} n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 4\right) \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \sqrt{4 \, n + 5} {\left(n + 4\right)}^{3} \left(2 \, n\right)!}{\sqrt{4 \, n + 1} {\left(n + 3\right)}^{3} n^{2 \, n} \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} {\left(n + 3\right)} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 6\right) n!^{2}}{{\left(n + 2\right)} n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 4\right) \left(n + 1\right)!^{2}} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} {\left(n + 3\right)}^{2} \left(2 \, n\right)! \log\left(5 \, n^{3} + 5\right)}{{\left(n + 4\right)}^{2} n^{2 \, n} \left(2 \, n + 2\right)! \log\left(5 \, {\left(n + 1\right)}^{3} + 5\right)} \right|}
{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 3\right) \left(2 \, n\right)!}{n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 1\right) \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} {\left(n + 3\right)}^{2} \left(2 \, n\right)! \log\left(5 \, {\left(n + 1\right)}^{3} + 2\right)}{{\left(n + 2\right)}^{2} n^{2 \, n} \left(2 \, n + 2\right)! \log\left(5 \, n^{3} + 2\right)} \right|}
{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 5\right) \left(2 \, n\right)!}{n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 3\right) \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}
{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 5\right) \left(2 \, n\right)!}{n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 3\right) \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 7\right) n!^{2} \log\left(5 \, n^{3} + 4\right)}{n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 5\right) \left(n + 1\right)!^{2} \log\left(5 \, {\left(n + 1\right)}^{3} + 4\right)} \right|}
{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \sqrt{2 \, n + 1} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 5\right) n!^{2}}{\sqrt{2 \, n + 3} n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 3\right) \left(n + 1\right)!^{2}} \right|}
{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \sqrt{2 \, n + 4} {\left(n + 3\right)} n!^{2}}{\sqrt{2 \, n + 6} {\left(n + 2\right)} n^{2 \, n} \left(n + 1\right)!^{2}} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 2\right) \left(2 \, n\right)! \log\left(5 \, n + 1\right)}{n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 4\right) \left(2 \, n + 2\right)! \log\left(5 \, n + 6\right)} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} {\left(n + 2\right)} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 3\right) \left(2 \, n\right)!}{{\left(n + 3\right)} n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 1\right) \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}
{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \sqrt{2 \, n + 5} \left(2 \, n\right)!}{\sqrt{2 \, n + 7} n^{2 \, n} \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}

{\left| \frac{\sqrt{4 \, n^{2} + 3} {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2} \left(2 \, n\right)!}{\sqrt{4 \, {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2} + 3} {\left(n + 2\right)}^{2} n^{2 \, n} \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}
{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \sqrt{5 \, n + 9} {\left(n + 3\right)} n!^{2}}{\sqrt{5 \, n + 4} {\left(n + 2\right)} n^{2 \, n} \left(n + 1\right)!^{2}} \right|}

{\left| \frac{\sqrt{4 \, {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2} + 3} {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \arctan\left(n + 2\right) \left(2 \, n\right)!}{\sqrt{4 \, n^{2} + 3} n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(n + 1\right) \left(2 \, n + 2\right)!} \right|}

{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 3\right) n!^{2} \log\left(5 \, n^{2} + 2\right)}{n^{2 \, n} \arctan\left(2 \, n + 1\right) \left(n + 1\right)!^{2} \log\left(5 \, {\left(n + 1\right)}^{2} + 2\right)} \right|}
{\left| \frac{{\left(n + 1\right)}^{2 \, n + 2} \sqrt{3 \, n + 8} n!^{2}}{\sqrt{3 \, n + 5} n^{2 \, n} \left(n + 1\right)!^{2}} \right|}
